title: CAT Portable Adapter Configuration
description: Configuration for a .cat/ adapter folder in a host project.

cat_mission_id.description: CAT mission this project is associated with.

sync_mode.description: How state is updated. read_only = project writes, CAT only reads.

cat_repo_url.description: URL or local path to the main CAT repository (optional).

validation_rules.description: Schema IDs or filenames to import from CAT for local validation.

allowed_paths.description: Paths in this repo that CAT validation may reference.
